pi_items.source: Multiple geographic databases (latlong.net, latitude.to, GPS-latitude-longitude.com). Official Eiffel Tower location verified via Google Maps API.
Multiple geographic databases (latlong.net, latitude.to, GPS-latitude-longitude.com). Official Eiffel Tower location verified via Google Maps API.
Official geographic databases and Google Maps confirm this is the correct name for the location at coordinates 48.8583°N, 2.2945°E

Verified via multiple sources: (1) Official location: Champ de Mars, 5 Avenue Anatole France, 75007 Paris, France (Google Maps, coordinates-converter.com); (2) Eiffel Tower is the official English name, Tour Eiffel in French; (3) Champ de Mars is the official name of the public space where Eiffel Tower is located (Wikipedia); (4) Coordinate prefixes match the verified coordinates.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires navigating to the Eiffel Tower in Paris using GPS coordinates. The metadata claims coordinates 48.85837, 2.29448 for the target location. These coordinates have been verified against multiple authoritative geographic databases (latlong.net, latitude.to, Google Maps) which confirm they correspond to the Eiffel Tower's actual location at 48.858093°N, 2.294694°E. The minor differences (≈30 meters latitude, ≈15-20 meters longitude) represent standard rounding precision and are negligible for GPS navigation purposes. The target name 'Eiffel Tower' is verified as the official English name. All expected context keywords (Paris, Eiffel, Tour, Champ de Mars, Anatole France, France, 48.85, 2.29) are accurate and relevant to the actual location. The data represents real-world geographic information, not synthetic data. The task uses the genuine Sygic GPS Navigation & Maps Android application (package com.sygic.aura) which operates on real map data.
